items.headline: SpaceX launches 27 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 from Vandenberg (fixture)

explainer.tagline: Fixture item for layout testing. Not a real news item; removed at launch prep.
explainer.what_happened: SpaceX launched a Falcon 9 carrying 27 Starlink satellites from Vandenberg Space Force Base. The booster landed on a droneship, per the launch webcast.
explainer.why_it_matters: Starlink deployment cadence sets the pace for every competing connectivity constellation and keeps downward pressure on rideshare pricing.

items.headline: ICEYE signs SAR data contract with ESA for flood monitoring (fixture)

explainer.tagline: Fixture item for layout testing. Not a real news item; removed at launch prep.
explainer.what_happened: ICEYE announced a contract with the European Space Agency to supply SAR imagery for flood monitoring across member states. The company did not disclose the contract value.
explainer.why_it_matters: Institutional SAR procurement in Europe is a recurring revenue base that ICEYE competitors bid for; each award shifts reference pricing for the next tender.

items.headline: AST SpaceMobile receives FCC approval for constellation modification (fixture)

explainer.tagline: Fixture item for layout testing. Not a real news item; removed at launch prep.
explainer.what_happened: The FCC granted AST SpaceMobile a modification of its space station authorization, per the filing. The grant covers changes to the planned constellation configuration.
explainer.why_it_matters: Direct-to-device spectrum and licensing decisions in the US market define the commercial ceiling for every D2D operator, and FCC grants are the binding constraint.

items.headline: ICEYE wins Iberdrola pilot deal to monitor grid amid extreme weather

explainer.tagline: Iberdrola picked ICEYE for a 12-month satellite grid-monitoring pilot.
explainer.what_happened: ICEYE said Iberdrola, which it describes as Europe's largest electricity utility, selected it for a 12-month pilot project starting in Spain, using ICEYE's SAR satellite data to monitor Iberdrola's electricity network for windstorm, wildfire, and hurricane risk. ICEYE said the deal was the winning entry in Iberdrola's PERSEO open-innovation program, which drew more than 40 proposals from 10 countries, and that the pilot uses its Flood Solutions Suite with plans to extend monitoring to the US and Australia.
explainer.why_it_matters: Iberdrola says it operates over 1.4 million kilometers of transmission and distribution lines serving more than 100 million people, so a successful pilot could turn into a recurring monitoring contract at utility scale. It also signals SAR earth observation data moving beyond insurance and government clients into utility grid-resilience budgets, a vertical ICEYE and its SAR competitors have been courting.

items.headline: ICEYE extends wildfire intelligence coverage to Canada

explainer.tagline: ICEYE extended its SAR wildfire-monitoring service to Canada.
explainer.what_happened: ICEYE said it is extending its wildfire intelligence suite, which uses synthetic aperture radar (SAR) to deliver near real-time monitoring and building-level damage assessment, to Canada. ICEYE said Canada now joins the US and Australia as the regions where its full wildfire toolset is available, and that SAR can operate through smoke, cloud cover, and darkness.
explainer.why_it_matters: SAR-based wildfire monitoring gives insurers, utilities, and emergency responders damage assessment that optical imagery cannot deliver through smoke. ICEYE cited the Canadian Climate Institute's finding that the last three fire seasons rank among the 10 worst on record, and the expansion opens ICEYE to Canadian insurers and provincial agencies building out wildfire-risk products.
